overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the Mediterranean-inspired city of Beauclair. The character traverses from a city gate across an ornate bridge, through bustling squares, and along palace terraces with mountain backdrops. The footage features bright sunny weather, historic stone architecture, and moderate pedestrian activity.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city gate with Geralt walking through a stone archway into a sunlit plaza. The camera follows as he approaches an ornate bridge, passing a guard on the left. The environment transitions from the semi-covered gate to the open bridge approach with cobblestone ground.

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across an ornate stone bridge lined with gargoyle statues on both sides. The bridge offers open views of the sky and distant mountains. The camera follows steadily as he approaches the far end where a clock tower rises above the cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: city square with decorative archway and colorful townhouses

agents.ego_description: turning into the city square and navigating through pedestrians

entered.detail: ornate stone archway with Gothic tracery marking plaza entrance
multi-story buildings with red and orange facades and shuttered windows
large Gothic palace with spires and ornate stonework visible in distance
open cobblestone square with decorative paving patterns

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, Geralt turns right into a bustling city square with a decorative stone archway. Colorful townhouses line the streets, and the Beauclair palace becomes visible in the distance. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians moving in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace gardens with mountain views

events.description: entering palace garden terraces with ornate railings
descending stone stairs to lower terrace

agents.ego_description: walking through palace gardens and descending terraces

notable_agents.action: painter working at easel depicting the palace

entered.detail: manicured gardens with flower beds and topiary
ornate stone balustrades lining the terrace edges
wooden easel with canvas where an artist is painting
decorative stone fountain in lower plaza area

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the palace terrace gardens where the Beauclair palace dominates the right side of the frame. He passes a painter working at an easel and descends stone stairs past ornate railings. The gardens feature manicured vegetation and offer expansive views of the mountain valley beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower city streets near waterfront with market activity

events.description: entering lower city market area with fountain
navigating through crowd near market carts

agents.ego_description: walking through lower city streets passing market vendors

entered.detail: wooden cart loaded with goods for sale
narrow cobblestone streets with colorful buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking through the lower city streets near the waterfront, passing market carts and vendors. The Beauclair palace recedes into the background while the camera navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic along cobblestone paths lined with flower bushes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a fortified city entrance through the heart of Beauclair, transitioning from narrow stone gateways to expansive palace gardens and bustling waterfront streets. It begins as Geralt passes through a shaded stone archway into a sunlit plaza, moving steadily toward an ornate bridge lined with gargoyle statues that opens up the view to distant mountains and a rising clock tower. As he crosses the bridge, the scene shifts into a vibrant city square filled with colorful townhouses and pedestrians before turning toward the imposing Beauclair palace. The camera then follows him into the palace terrace gardens, descending stone stairs past a painter and manicured greenery that overlooks a wide mountain valley. Finally, the perspective glides down into the lower city, where the palace recedes into the background as the path winds past market vendors and flower bushes along the cobblestone waterfront.
